title: Character Interaction System — Agent-to-Agent Visual Communication
description: Make agents visually communicate with each other. Nameplate polish, task context formatting, chat bubbles + facing direction for subagent interactions, brainstorm → meeting room movement, reviewer walks to builder's desk.

in: Nameplate polish: smaller plates, no role tags, brand-colored name text
Task context text: formatActivity() with tool verbs + filename extraction
Chat bubble + facing direction for parent-subagent interactions
Meeting room routing for brainstorm sessions (3+ subagents)
Reviewer walks to builder's desk during review phase

dod.criterion: Nameplates render compact with brand-colored name text, no role tags
Task context text shows readable verb+filename below nameplate for working agents
Chat bubbles appear above both agents in parent-subagent interactions
Interacting agents face each other (non-walking only)
3+ simultaneous subagents triggers meeting room routing
Reviewer walks to builder's desk during review sessions
All dead code (roleMap, unused constants) cleaned up
Type-check and build pass

tasks.title: Review: Nameplate Polish
tasks.scope: Code review of nameplate changes: role tag removal, reduced plate size, brand color text. Clean dead code (roleMap, unused constants).
tasks.user_scenario: Agent nameplates are compact with name text in the agent's brand color, no role tags cluttering the display.

dod.criterion: renderIdentityPlates no longer renders role tags
Name text renders in agent brand color (from colorMap)
Plate dimensions are smaller than previous version
No dead constants or unreachable code paths
Type-check passes

tasks.title: Review: Task Context Text Formatting
tasks.scope: Code review of formatActivity() and taskTextMap integration. Fix edge cases and add missing tool verbs.
tasks.user_scenario: Below each working agent's nameplate, a readable verb+filename summary appears instead of raw tool+path strings.

dod.criterion: formatActivity correctly maps all known tool names to readable verbs
Path stripping extracts filename from full paths
Edge cases handled: empty/undefined detail, unknown tools, long filenames
Task text renders at reduced opacity below nameplate for working/waiting agents
Type-check passes

tasks.title: Review: Chat Bubble + Facing Direction
tasks.scope: Code review of agentInteractions prop flow, interactionMap, renderChatBubbles, and facing direction save/restore.
tasks.user_scenario: When two agents have a parent-subagent relationship, both display chat bubbles and face each other.

dod.criterion: agentInteractions derived correctly from parent/subagent session pairs
interactionMap built without duplicates
Facing direction override only applies to non-walking agents
Original facing direction restored after render
Chat bubbles render centered above both interacting agents
Stale pairs clean up when subagent sessions end
Type-check passes

tasks.title: Move Agent Group to Meeting Room for Brainstorm Sessions
tasks.scope: Detect 3+ active subagents per parent, route group to meeting room waypoints. Track meeting state, clear when count drops below 3.
tasks.user_scenario: When the directive pipeline spawns a brainstorm with 3+ subagents, the parent and subagents walk to the conference room.

dod.criterion: Parent agent with 3+ active subagents triggers meeting room routing
Parent and all subagents walk to meeting room waypoints
Meeting state tracked per parent agent ID
When subagent count drops below 3, agents return to normal positions
No new CharacterState enum values added
Type-check and build pass

tasks.title: Reviewer Agent Walks to Builder's Desk During Review
tasks.scope: Detect review interactions from session metadata. Route reviewer to walkable tile adjacent to builder's seat. Return to normal when review ends.
tasks.user_scenario: During a code review, the reviewer character walks over to the builder's desk.

dod.criterion: Review interaction detected from subagent session metadata
Reviewer character walks to a walkable tile adjacent to builder's seat
Reviewer returns to normal routing when review session ends
No new CharacterState enum values added
Type-check and build pass
